account.title: Login
account.description: Access your favourites, requests and private selections.
account.fillAllFields: Please fill in all registration fields.
account.passwordTooShort: Password must be more than 10 characters and include an uppercase letter and a special character.
account.duplicateEmailSuccess: An account already exists for this email.
account.registrationSucceeded: Registration succeeded. Please check your email and verify your account before logging in.
account.registrationInterrupted: Registration response was interrupted. If retry says the account already exists, the first request succeeded.
account.passwordRequirements: Use more than 10 characters, at least one uppercase letter, and at least one special character.
account.loginMissingFields: Please enter your email and password.
account.emailVerificationRequired: Please verify your email before logging in.
account.accountDisabled: Your account is disabled. Please contact support.
account.loginRequestFailed: Login request failed. Please check your connection.
account.passwordInvalidInline: Password must be more than 10 characters and include an uppercase letter and a special character.
account.verificationEmailResent: Verification email sent again. Please check your inbox.
account.resendVerificationFailed: Could not resend the verification email. Please try again later.
account.forgotDescription: Enter your email and we will send a secure reset link if an account exists.
account.passwordResetEmailSent: Password reset link sent. Please check your inbox.
account.passwordResetRequestFailed: Could not send the password reset email. Please try again later.
account.passwordResetAccountNotFound: No account exists for this email.
account.passwordResetCooldown: Please wait before requesting another password reset email.

verifyEmail.title: Email verification
verifyEmail.success: Your email has been verified. You can now log in normally.
verifyEmail.error: We could not verify your email. The link may be invalid or expired.
verifyEmail.networkError: Verification failed because the server could not be reached.
verifyEmail.missingToken: This verification link is missing its token.

footer.subscribeText: Receive occasional updates on new works, exhibitions, and quiet moments from the gallery.

hero.slide2Title:
Each work
captures a suspended moment.

cart.checkoutText: This sample checkout view is ready for future billing, delivery, and payment integrations.
cart.confirmationText: This sample confirmation page shows where order details, receipt information, and next steps will appear.

home.curatedTitle: An experience shaped like a dialogue
home.curatedDescription: Each work captures a moment, between light, movement, and the memory of place.
home.whyShopDescription: Discover original paintings, fine art photography, sculpture, and more from a curated selection of original art.
home.whyCard1Text: Explore a worldwide selection of original artwork for sale by thousands of artists.
home.whyCard2Text: Our 14-day satisfaction guarantee allows you to buy with confidence.
home.whyCard3Text: We deliver world-class customer service to all of our art buyers.
home.whyCard4Text: We pay our artists more on every sale than other galleries.
home.whyOriginalSubtitle: Collect art that feels personal, lasting, and alive.
home.whyOriginalBody: Original works bring texture, individuality, and emotional weight into a space in a way mass-produced decor usually cannot.
home.displaySectionTitle: Enter the world of the work
home.displaySectionSubtitle: Explore different ways of looking, feeling, and making art your own.
home.displaySample1Description: Explore the variations of a single motif through time and light.
home.displaySample1Alt: Blue and white textured painting with a sailboat
home.displaySample2Description: Discover the full selection of available paintings.
home.displaySample2Alt: Detail of a white and blue textured painting
home.displaySample3Description: Between gesture, matter, and memory, the painting slowly takes shape.
home.displaySample3Alt: Blue painting gesture on a white textured surface
home.displaySample4Description: Imagine the work within an interior, and the relationship it creates with the place.
home.displaySample4Alt: Framed blue and white painting in an interior
home.curatorFavoritesSubtitle: Five ways of feeling the world through my works.
home.curatorFavorite1Description:
Between movement and light,
the city becomes sensation.
home.curatorFavorite2Description:
An outdoor space where light
reflects and stretches through time.
home.curatorFavorite3Description:
A fragile presence,
between gaze and transformation.
home.curatorFavorite4Description:
Color becomes energy,
and transforms the landscape.
home.curatorFavorite5Description:
The city grows quiet,
and the light remains.
home.curatorFavorite6Description:
A warm light settles on the water,
and silence becomes an interior space.
home.whyOriginalCard1Description:
The work enters the space without dominating it.
It gently accompanies the gaze.
home.whyOriginalCard2Description:
Each texture catches the light differently.
The painting changes with the moment.
home.whyOriginalCard3Description:
A work does not simply decorate.
It redefines how a place is inhabited.
home.whyOriginalCard4Description:
The work creates a visual and mental pause.
It opens a space to breathe.
home.whyOriginalCard5Description: Well beyond the gaze, the work leaves a subtle and lasting trace.

about.name: Sylvaine
about.intro: Sylvaine is a painter based in Montreal.
about.body: Her work explores light, perception and the memory of landscape through oil painting and drawing.
about.metaDescription: About Sylvaine, painter based in Montreal.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.passwordInvalid: Password must be more than 10 characters and include an uppercase letter and a special character.
resetPassword.success: Your password has been reset. You can now log in with the new password.
resetPassword.error: We could not reset your password. The link may be invalid or expired.
resetPassword.networkError: Password reset failed because the server could not be reached.
resetPassword.missingToken: This password reset link is missing its token.
resetPassword.samePassword: New password must be different from your current password.

profile.subtitle: Review saved details, manage account settings, and inspect order activity in one quiet workspace.

profile.addressLoadFailed: Could not load addresses. Sample addresses are shown for layout only.

profile.addressRemoveFailed: Could not remove the address. Please try again.
profile.noAddressBody: Add a Canadian address to use it during checkout.
profile.postalCodeInvalid: Enter a valid Canadian postal code, for example H2Y 1Z9.

profile.samePassword: New password must be different from your current password.
